name: ProjectDepot
focus: An umbrella for tools + info to help other project builders.
description:
SrcGallery precedes ProjectDepot and was the first project in this direction.

ProjectDepot is the larger vision for a set of tools and resources that make it easier to turn ideas into real projects.

SrcGallery was after realizing that an up-to-date portfolio is annoying to maintain.

name: ProjectDepot - Starters
focus: Reusable starter kits to get to a strong first version fast.
description: This is my long-term aim to address the problems I've faced when starting (or trying to start) projects.
details: Links to starter projects that I like or use + my own boilerplates based on my preferred stack(s).
Sharing my process for throwing up a project in order to tackle a vision.

name: buddyGenAI
description:
Ever since I could see the first 2-month prototype, I promoted bGAI to my Main/Best/Proudest project. I've put the project down by now though, which is a bummer.

So (one thing) I'm putting thought toward is making it mine -- a bit scary + vulnerable-feeling.
details: Show and Tell: I made the thing, so it's up to me to guide others how it can be used.

Re-aligning Scope: In the pursuit of popularity and making the project more accessible to understand (lol as if), I began adding Cloud Providers, which I regret because it was a compromise on something I already decided.
The next iteration will only connect with privacy-preserving AI models.

name: airbattle-hosting
focus: My contribution to the AIRMASH community
